issues.description: Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. The effect prevents Characters from being rested (a restriction/keyword grant), not rests them. Should use 'GiveKeyword' with keyword 'CannotRest' or similar, or use a custom restriction action. Current DSL incorrectly rests the characters instead of preventing them from being rested.

Missing duration field. Text states 'cannot be rested until the end of your opponent's next End Phase' — this is a temporary restriction during opponent's turn. Should have duration:'DuringOpponentTurn' or appropriate end condition.
Condition type 'HasCardOnBoard' is incorrect. Should be 'LeaderHasType' to check if the Leader has {Donquixote Pirates} type, not check for a card on board.
The second option (prevent rest) should not use 'Rest' action three times. It should use a prevention/restriction mechanism. Current implementation is semantically wrong.
